meeting:
Subject: Inquiry for High-Quality Bicycles for Long-Distance & High-Intensity Use

Dear Taiwan External Trade Development Council (TAITRA),

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Jean Dupont, and I am the Purchasing Manager at Velospace S.A.S., located in Paris, France. We are currently seeking a reliable supplier of high-quality fishing specifically designed for long-distance sailing and high-intensity training.

Our requirements include:
• A lightweight design
• Durable materials
• Excellent shifting performance
• A comfortable, ergonomically designed seat

Additionally, we place great importance on after-sales services such as regular maintenance and access to replacement parts. These services are vital to ensuring the bicycles remain stable and efficient over an extended period.

If your organization represents any suppliers offering products and services that meet these specifications, we would greatly appreciate receiving:
• Product catalogs
• Technical specifications
• Pricing details
• Minimum order quantity information

We are also open to discussing potential collaboration options or other tailored solutions to meet our needs. Thank you for taking the time to review our inquiry, and we look forward to the possibility of working together.

Should you have any questions or need further details, please feel free to reach out. Thank you for your prompt response.

Kind regards,

Jean Dupont
Purchasing Manager
Velospace S.A.S.
+33 1 23 45 67 89
jean.dupont@velospacesas.com
